title: neocheiropteris subhastatum
intro: Neocheiropteris subhastatum, a type of fern plant, is a species of Neocheiropteris, a genus of extinct and extant ferns. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris subhastatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the leaves for use in capsules or other supplements.
